arbiter_score.caveat: TEMPLATE — coefficients illustrative, not fit on real mammography outcomes. n_training=0. Do not report AUROC; there is nothing to average over. Prospective AUROC will be established only after Phase 3 EMBED / CBIS-DDSM training runs land with an independent test split. This artefact locks the schema and honesty gates; it does not encode a validated model.

caveat: AUROC reflects the model's ability to discriminate within literature-derived events whose labels and features co-originate from the same published narratives. This circularity inflates apparent performance. Expected prospective AUROC: 0.70–0.85 based on independent validation.

demo_provenance.notes: Real CBIS-DDSM Mass-Test DICOM ran through /v1/screening/analyze. The vision embedding was computed by google/medsiglip-448 on an A10G GPU via Modal; the CBIS-DDSM linear probe scored the 1152-d embedding to P(cancer). Zero-shot MedSigLIP prompt findings are also returned (off-label — see warnings).

disclaimer: RESEARCH USE ONLY — not validated for clinical decision-making. Not FDA-cleared. Not CE-marked. Investigational / IRB context only.

findings.label: a mammogram of a breast with a malignant mass
a mammogram of a breast without a malignant mass

warnings: This score is from google/medsiglip-448 (HAI-DEF-gated Health AI Developer Foundations model). MedSigLIP is a genuine medical vision-language model, but its published training corpus covers chest X-ray (MIMIC-CXR), dermatology (SCIN, PAD-UFES-20), ophthalmology (EyePACS), histopathology (TCGA, CAMELYON), and CT/MRI slices — it does NOT include mammography. Running MedSigLIP zero-shot on a mammogram is therefore OFF-LABEL and this score is an out-of-distribution probe, not a validated mammographic score. The only Google-published breast-related AUROC for MedSigLIP is histopathology (Invasive Breast Cancer, n=5000, 3-class, zero-shot 0.933 / linear-probe 0.930 / HAI-DEF LP 0.943).

This probe is a supervised classifier trained on 2445 CBIS-DDSM images using MedSigLIP-448 embeddings (held-out test AUC = 0.7526 on n=641). MedSigLIP-448 was NOT pretrained on mammography — the backbone is used off-label. Fine-tuned mammography CNNs on CBIS-DDSM typically reach AUC 0.85-0.90, so this probe is a research prototype, not a clinical tool.
